description_long: This house features a steep red-tiled gable roof with a prominent stone chimney rising along one side. The exterior walls are finished in white plaster, accented by exposed wooden beams and a stone foundation. Multiple wooden balconies and overhangs add architectural interest, while the windows are framed in dark wood and vary in size and placement. The main entrance is sheltered by a wooden awning and accessed via a small set of steps. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper floor slightly overhanging the lower level. The overall design suggests a rustic, European-inspired residential building suitable for a suburban or village setting.
description: A two-story house with a red-tiled gable roof, white plaster walls, stone foundation, and wooden accents. Features include a tall stone chimney, wooden balconies, and a sheltered main entrance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with the tall stone chimney, red-tiled roof, and a wooden awning over the entrance.
description_view_1: The front view shows the main entryway with a small porch, centered window above, and symmetrical roofline with the chimney at the back.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a rear balcony, a secondary entrance, and the overhanging upper story, with the chimney visible to the right.
description_view_3: The back view displays the full height of the stone chimney, the rear wall with minimal windows, and a side balcony.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with a small porch, overhanging awning, and stone steps
